name: Raki (Licorice Liqueur)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chopped licorice root and vodka in a jar.
2. Allow the mixture to marinate for one week, stirring occasionally.
3. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth into a clean container.
4. Add sugar syrup to taste.
5. Store the liqueur for at least three months to allow flavors to meld.
6. Taste after aging; the aftertaste may be slightly bitter initially but improves over time.
